working_on.notes: Added advanced Excel-like table interactions and a flexible 3-pane dashboard layout.

pending_tasks.notes: Document all UI features for the end-user.

recent_changes.description: Implemented Excel-like Sort & Filter with glassmorphism menus.
Added linked-pair column resizing for the summary table.
Overhauled to 3-pane responsive layout with draggable resizers.

errors_encountered.error: Table horizontal scroll conflict with column resizing
errors_encountered.solution: Used linked-pair resizing strategy to maintain table width integrity.

decisions_made.reason: Provides instant feedback without extra Tauri IPC overhead for simple table interactions.
Essential for managing screen real estate in a multi-panel desktop app.
